jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.

lastHealthyBaseline.tests: Full Vitest passed: 172 files / 698 tests during fresh-audit checkpoint
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws active; /api/status healthy; major HTML/API probes returned 307/401/200; recent service logs clean

lastRun.target: Fresh comprehensive audit checkpoint after six successful remediation runs
lastRun.summary: No code/runtime changes were required in this checkpoint. Verified clean git/remote baseline, production availability, route probes, recent logs, and the full local quality gate. Backlog was refreshed with the checkpoint and the remaining priority remains P6 operator-visible worker diagnostics/richer command task reconciliation before the next full post-backlog audit.
validation: git status and overlap process check before work
recent production logs checked with no error/warn matches
lastRun.deployment: No restart was necessary because this checkpoint made no code/runtime change; smoke and route probes validated current deployed services.
lastRun.nextTarget: P6 durable command/deployment background-worker architecture: operator-visible worker ownership/heartbeat diagnostics and richer restart-surviving task reconciliation.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
